title: The Financial Crisis
_doc: State machine. Steps authored by Code role. Each step: { id, gates, on_enter, on_exit }. Text fields (description, label, hint, flavor) belong to Design role; mechanical fields belong to Code.
_new_flags_phase7: Two flags added for phase-7 dialogue pass. 'met_asia' is set by asia.json 'first_welcome' on_dismiss. 'viewed_family_photo' is set by cula.json 'family_photo_ch1' on_dismiss. Both must be added to state.gd reset_state() chapter1 block and wired into a save.gd migration step before engine use.
_new_flags_ch1_phase_a: Chapter 1 Phase A — Tier 1 implementation plan §A.1. Extends chapter1 flag set to cover Beat 7-14 (client meeting, archive, court rounds, postcard). Adds top-level 'badges' and 'routes_unlocked' dictionaries (semantic owners: DialogueRunner award_badge / unlock_route actions). SAVE_VERSION bumped 7→8.
_new_flags_session46_catchup: Session 46 (2026-05-16) — registry catch-up. Fourteen chapter1 flags were declared in state.gd::reset_state() since phase-7 but never registered here. Surfaced by test_chapter1_v17_flag_coverage.gd T2/T6 (fail-soft drift detector). Session 39's v15 catch-up closed state_choice; this pass closes the remaining baseline + coffee + court + Phase B met-flag gaps and murrow_choice. No save migration required — runtime defaults are unchanged; this is a registry-only catch-up completing the declared-shape record.

new_state_flags._enum_revision_note: v3 motion-packet foundation: keeps frame/blunder selector but aligns values to packet-driven synthesis. overbroad_remedy added as selectable blunder; incapacity_defense retained with sharp penalties.
